description_long: This is a pair of slip-joint pliers featuring two elongated, slightly curved handles coated in a greenish material, likely for improved grip and comfort. The jaws are robust and feature a curved, serrated gripping surface, designed to hold or turn objects of varying sizes. The pivot mechanism is a slip-joint, allowing the jaws to adjust to two different widths for versatility. The metal surfaces show signs of wear and oxidation, suggesting frequent use and exposure to the elements. The handles are relatively thick and ergonomically shaped, tapering slightly towards the ends. No visible branding or logo is present on the tool.
description: A worn pair of green-handled slip-joint pliers with curved, serrated jaws and an adjustable pivot. The tool shows signs of use and features ergonomic, coated handles.
description_view_0: The pliers are seen from an angled top-down view, highlighting the open jaws and the curvature of the handles.
description_view_1: A side profile view shows the full length of the handles and the thickness of the jaw area, emphasizing the slip-joint mechanism.
description_view_2: This rear-angled view displays the handles' ergonomic taper and the open position of the jaws.
description_view_3: A direct top view reveals the full shape of the pliers, the slip-joint pivot, and the serrated jaw design.
attribute_handle_type: Elongated, slightly curved, green rubber-coated handles with ergonomic taper.
attribute_jaw_design: Curved, serrated jaws with a slip-joint adjustment slot, suitable for gripping various shapes.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Slip-joint pivot allowing two jaw width settings for adjustable grip.
attribute_grip_pattern: Smooth rubberized coating on handles for enhanced grip.
